title: Add blur effect to hero background image for better text visibility

requirements.text: Apply a blur effect to the hero section background image in the Hero component to make the yellow text (heading 'Pureblend Spice Private Limited', tagline 'Pure Taste. Pure Health. Pureblend.', and description paragraphs) stand out more clearly against the background

quotes: in the first page make the picture kinda blurrish to make the words stand out

acceptanceCriteria: The hero section background image has a visible blur effect applied
The yellow text remains clearly readable and stands out against the blurred background
The blur effect is subtle enough to maintain visual appeal while improving text contrast
The effect is applied using CSS techniques (backdrop-filter or filter property on the background layer)

constraints: Do not modify the yellow text color that was recently implemented
Preserve the existing hero section layout and structure
Do not change any other components outside the Hero component
nonGoals: Modifying other sections of the website
Adding new content to the hero section
